arts.ttl: How Joao Felix became football's £171MILLION misfit: Berated by his own team-mates in latest miserable loan spell, unwanted by Chelsea after shock return and struggles in Spain
arts.sum: Joao Felix was once touted as football's biggest prospect. After bursting onto the scene in Portugal, it wasn't long before comparisons with Cristiano Ronaldo were made.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca issues withering putdown of Jadon Sancho form
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has refused to discuss whether Jadon Sancho will be a Chelsea player next season or not, but admitted the winger has not been good enough this season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea could have easier route to sign Newcastle target – BlueCo ‘key’ for summer move
arts.sum: Chelsea and Newcastle United are in the picture to sign RC Strasbourg’s Emanuel Emegha in the summer window. Journalist Mohamed Toubache-Ter took to X, formerly known as Twitter, to state Chelsea have the 22-year-old’s name is ‘on the table’. The striker’s ‘meteoric rise’ at the Ligue 1 club has caught Newcastle’s attention. Ex-Spurs chief Paratici in talks with AC Milan
arts.sum: Fabio Paratici is in talks with AC Milan over becoming their sporting director, a move that would end his ties with Tottenham.
